name: @firstpick/pi-skill-deep-research
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for high-stakes or complex research needing multi-source evidence, scientific/technical fact-checking, decision traces, or rigorous verification. Runs deterministic two-phase research with schema/policy validation.
description_zh: 代理应调用此技能进行高风险或复杂研究，需要多源证据、科学/技术事实核查、决策跟踪或严格验证。运行确定性的两阶段研究，包含模式/策略验证
